message:
refactor(db): simplify close_db_conn and use franken connections for migrations

Replace close_db_conn's explicit close_sync() call with a simple drop(),
letting the connection's own destructor handle cleanup. Switch the
migration init path from canonical SQLite connections to the standard
franken pool opener, removing the now-unnecessary workaround for
malformed-index behavior on legacy fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
